module.name: avatarrow
module.description: A row of circular avatars with names/roles — for a team, panel or contributors. Body = one person per section: image then name then role.
module.aiSpec:
A row of TEAM / people cards — circular avatar over a name and role. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one person per section written on up to three lines: line 1 = an image (`![](@alias)` or a URL) OR an emoji to use as the avatar, line 2 = the NAME, line 3 = the role / affiliation. Parameters: `size` (default 72px) is a CSS length for the avatar diameter; `color` (default var(--accent-color)) sets the avatar ring color. Good for team, speakers, acknowledgements. For a single speaker with a speech bubble use @balloon.
Example: <!-- @avatarrow --> ![](@alice) Alice Kim Engineering <!-- @ --> 👩‍🔬 Bob Sato Research <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Ring color
param.desc: Color of the ring around each avatar

snippet.label: Team / avatars row
snippet.description: Each section: image or emoji / name / role.
